meta_title: For Students: freelance pitching to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching: How to Solve 'Can't Debug' as a Student
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn how to leverage freelance pitching and AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to build your portfolio and ship faster.
content.answer_block: When you hit a debugging wall, stop spinning your wheels. Use freelance pitching to frame your technical constraints as scope management opportunities. By deploying Claude Code for architectural analysis and Antigravity for rapid iteration, you transform 'I can't debug this' into a professional, billable client communication strategy.
content.intro:
The screen is glowing, the cursor is blinking, and your project is effectively dead in the water. That sinking feeling—the realization that your code has evolved into an unmanageable labyrinth—is the rite of passage every senior engineer has faced. You aren't failing; you're just at the threshold where amateur coding ends and professional engineering begins.

The secret isn't knowing everything; it's knowing how to recover. By pivoting to a freelance mindset, you stop viewing bugs as personal failures and start viewing them as project requirements. We are going to use high-leverage AI tools to automate the heavy lifting, allowing you to pitch your way out of technical debt while building a portfolio that demands attention.

steps.title: Audit the Technical Debt
steps.description: Before pitching, identify the exact failure point. Use AI to map the dependency graph so you can explain the 'why' behind the bug to a potential client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase and generate a dependency map highlighting the specific module causing the current runtime error.

steps.title: Draft the 'Scope Adjustment' Pitch
steps.description: Instead of saying 'I can't fix this,' pitch a pivot. Frame the bug as a design constraint that requires a more robust architectural solution.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a professional email to a client explaining that we are refactoring a module to improve long-term scalability, citing the current bug as the catalyst.

steps.title: Automated Bug Isolation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to isolate the logic error from the rest of your application to ensure your fix doesn't break the entire build.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a minimal reproduction script for this specific function to isolate the logic error from the main application flow.

steps.title: Implement the Defensive Patch
steps.description: Apply a hotfix that prioritizes system stability. This demonstrates senior-level decision making to your stakeholders.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a defensive patch for this function that includes error handling and a fallback state to prevent system crashes.

steps.title: Portfolio Documentation
steps.description: Turn the bug-fix process into a case study. Documenting the challenge and the AI-assisted resolution is prime portfolio material.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize this debugging session into a technical blog post format suitable for a developer portfolio, highlighting the 'problem-analysis-solution' loop.

pro_tips: Never admit you are stuck; always present two viable paths forward and ask the client to choose based on their timeline.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests before you write the fix; it forces you to define the 'done' state clearly.
When pitching, focus on the business impact of the fix rather than the technical complexity of the bug.
Keep a 'Bug Journal' where you store every Antigravity prompt that successfully solved a production issue.
Always refactor the fix in a separate branch to keep your main production history clean and professional.
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, begin your first freelance outreach campaign on LinkedIn, positioning yourself as an 'AI-Augmented Developer' who specializes in rapid bug resolution and architectural stabilization.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical framework and the soft-skills strategy to turn any debugging nightmare into a professional success story. Don't let code blocks define your career trajectory. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
